display.purpose: Hero headlines, landing page titles. One per page maximum.

headline.purpose: Section titles, modal headers, map names.

title.purpose: Card titles, node names, form section headers.

body.purpose: Paragraphs, descriptions, form content. Max 65-75ch line length.

label.purpose: UI labels, button text, badge text, uppercase section labels.

shadows.name: ambient
shadows.purpose: Card base shadow, barely visible. Structural, not decorative.

shadows.name: elevated
shadows.purpose: Card hover state, paired with glow.

shadows.name: glow-dusk
shadows.purpose: Dusk button hover glow. Emotional, not structural.

shadows.name: glow-dawn
shadows.purpose: Dawn button hover glow. Emotional, not structural.

motion.name: ease-tension
motion.purpose: Primary hover, glow reveals. Slow charge-in.

motion.name: ease-snap
motion.purpose: Fast exits, UI state changes. Snap back.

motion.name: duration-pulse-a
motion.purpose: Prime number. First infinite pulse layer.

motion.name: duration-pulse-b
motion.purpose: Prime number. Second infinite pulse layer. Never syncs with pulse-a.

components.name: Dusk Primary Button
components.description: Primary CTA for expert-facing surfaces. Gradient from amber to rose with layered glow animation on hover.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-dusk">Start the Interview<svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M5 12h14"/><path d="m12 5 7 7-7 7"/></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-btn-dusk { position: relative; overflow: hidden; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; padding: 0.75rem 2rem; font-family: var(--font-bai-jamjuree), sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; color: white; background: linear-gradient(180deg, #f97316 0%, #ea580c 45%, #be185d 100%); border: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.14); border-radius: 12px; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px rgba(249,115,22,0.32), 0 1px 2px -1px rgba(0,0,0,0.55), 0 3px 14px rgba(194,65,12,0.28), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.2), inset 0 -2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.24); transition: box-shadow 160ms ease-out, transform 160ms ease-out, filter 160ms ease-out; min-height: 48px; } .ds-btn-dusk::before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; border-radius: 12px; background: linear-gradient(to top, rgba(255,210,100,0.26) 0%, rgba(255,170,50,0.09) 45%, transparent 100%); filter: blur(22px); transform: translateY(100%); opacity: 0; pointer-events: none; } .ds-btn-dusk::after { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; border-radius: 12px; background: linear-gradient(to top, rgba(234,88,12,0.22) 0%, rgba(251,146,60,0.07) 40%, transparent 100%); filter: blur(18px); transform: translateY(100%); opacity: 0; pointer-events: none; } .ds-btn-dusk > * { position: relative; z-index: 1; } .ds-btn-dusk:hover:not(:disabled) { animation: ds-btn-rise 10000ms cubic-bezier(0.05,0.7,0.35,0.99) forwards, ds-btn-glow 14000ms cubic-bezier(0.05,0.7,0.35,0.99) forwards; } .ds-btn-dusk:hover:not(:disabled)::before { animation: ds-btn-inner-rise 14000ms cubic-bezier(0.05,0.7,0.35,0.99) 350ms forwards, ds-btn-wave-a 4231ms ease-in-out 14350ms infinite; } .ds-btn-dusk:hover:not(:disabled)::after { animation: ds-btn-inner-rise-b 14000ms cubic-bezier(0.05,0.7,0.35,0.99) 900ms forwards, ds-btn-wave-b 5711ms ease-in-out 14900ms infinite; } @keyframes ds-btn-rise { 0% { transform: translateY(0); } 100% { transform: translateY(-3px); } } @keyframes ds-btn-glow { 0% { box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px rgba(249,115,22,0.32), 0 1px 2px -1px rgba(0,0,0,0.55), 0 3px 14px rgba(194,65,12,0.28), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.2), inset 0 -2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.24); } 100% { box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px rgba(251,146,60,0.5), 0 0 28px rgba(251,146,60,0.38), 0 0 72px rgba(251,146,60,0.16), 0 6px 22px rgba(0,0,0,0.38), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.24), inset 0 -2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.22); } } @keyframes ds-btn-inner-rise { 0% { transform: translateY(100%); opacity: 0; filter: blur(22px); } 100% { transform: translateY(0%); opacity: 0.52; filter: blur(7px); } } @keyframes ds-btn-inner-rise-b { 0% { transform: translateY(100%); opacity: 0; filter: blur(18px); } 100% { transform: translateY(0%); opacity: 0.24; filter: blur(12px); } } @keyframes ds-btn-wave-a { 0%,100% { opacity: 0.52; filter: blur(7px); } 50% { opacity: 0.78; filter: blur(3px); } } @keyframes ds-btn-wave-b { 0%,100% { opacity: 0.24; filter: blur(12px); } 50% { opacity: 0.48; filter: blur(7px); } }

components.name: Dawn Primary Button
components.description: Primary CTA for student-facing surfaces. Gradient from blue to violet with layered glow animation on hover.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-dawn">Start Exploring<svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M5 12h14"/><path d="m12 5 7 7-7 7"/></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-btn-dawn { position: relative; overflow: hidden; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; padding: 0.75rem 2rem; font-family: var(--font-bai-jamjuree), sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; color: white; background: linear-gradient(180deg, #3b82f6 0%, #6366f1 45%, #a855f7 100%); border: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.12); border-radius: 12px; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px rgba(99,102,241,0.32), 0 1px 2px -1px rgba(0,0,0,0.45), 0 3px 14px rgba(59,130,246,0.22), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.22), inset 0 -2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.18); transition: box-shadow 160ms ease-out, transform 160ms ease-out, filter 160ms ease-out; min-height: 48px; } .ds-btn-dawn::before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; border-radius: 12px; background: linear-gradient(to top, rgba(254,217,92,0.35) 0%, transparent 100%); filter: blur(22px); transform: translateY(100%); opacity: 0; pointer-events: none; } .ds-btn-dawn::after { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; border-radius: 12px; background: radial-gradient(circle at center, rgba(99,102,241,0.25) 0%, transparent 70%); filter: blur(18px); transform: translateY(100%); opacity: 0; pointer-events: none; } .ds-btn-dawn > * { position: relative; z-index: 1; } .ds-btn-dawn:hover:not(:disabled) { animation: ds-dawn-rise 10000ms cubic-bezier(0.05,0.7,0.35,0.99) forwards, ds-dawn-glow 14000ms cubic-bezier(0.05,0.7,0.35,0.99) forwards; } .ds-btn-dawn:hover:not(:disabled)::before { animation: ds-dawn-inner-rise 14000ms cubic-bezier(0.05,0.7,0.35,0.99) 350ms forwards, ds-dawn-wave-a 4127ms ease-in-out 14350ms infinite; } .ds-btn-dawn:hover:not(:disabled)::after { animation: ds-dawn-inner-rise-b 14000ms cubic-bezier(0.05,0.7,0.35,0.99) 900ms forwards, ds-dawn-wave-b 5503ms ease-in-out 14900ms infinite; } @keyframes ds-dawn-rise { 0% { transform: translateY(0); } 100% { transform: translateY(-3px); } } @keyframes ds-dawn-glow { 0% { box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px rgba(99,102,241,0.32), 0 1px 2px -1px rgba(0,0,0,0.45), 0 3px 14px rgba(59,130,246,0.22), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.22), inset 0 -2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.18); } 100% { box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px rgba(99,102,241,0.55), 0 0 24px rgba(99,102,241,0.35), 0 0 60px rgba(168,85,247,0.14), 0 6px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.3), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.28), inset 0 -2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.18); } } @keyframes ds-dawn-inner-rise { 0% { transform: translateY(100%); opacity: 0; filter: blur(22px); } 100% { transform: translateY(0%); opacity: 0.5; filter: blur(7px); } } @keyframes ds-dawn-inner-rise-b { 0% { transform: translateY(100%); opacity: 0; filter: blur(18px); } 100% { transform: translateY(0%); opacity: 0.22; filter: blur(12px); } } @keyframes ds-dawn-wave-a { 0%,100% { opacity: 0.5; filter: blur(8px); } 50% { opacity: 0.75; filter: blur(4px); } } @keyframes ds-dawn-wave-b { 0%,100% { opacity: 0.2; filter: blur(13px); } 50% { opacity: 0.42; filter: blur(8px); } }

components.name: Dusk Card
components.description: Dark glass card with bottom-to-top amber glow reveal on hover. Used for expert-facing content.
components.html:
Card Title

Card content goes here.
components.css: .ds-card-dusk { position: relative; background: linear-gradient(160deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.065) 0%, rgba(255,255,255,0.018) 100%); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.09); border-radius: 12px; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px rgba(139,26,90,0.14), 0 1px 3px -1px rgba(0,0,0,0.55), 0 4px 18px rgba(0,0,0,0.28), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.07), inset 0 -2px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.22); transition: box-shadow 180ms ease-out, border-color 180ms ease-out, transform 180ms ease-out; overflow: hidden; padding: 1.5rem; } .ds-card-dusk::before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: -1px; border-radius: 13px; background: linear-gradient(to top, rgba(251,146,60,0.38) 0%, rgba(251,146,60,0.14) 40%, rgba(251,146,60,0.03) 70%, transparent 100%); clip-path: inset(100% 0 0 0 round 13px); opacity: 0; filter: blur(18px); pointer-events: none; z-index: 0; transition: clip-path 200ms ease-out, opacity 200ms ease-out, filter 200ms ease-out; } .ds-card-dusk > * { position: relative; z-index: 1; } .ds-card-dusk:hover::before { clip-path: inset(0% 0 0 0 round 13px); opacity: 1; filter: blur(3px); transition: clip-path 9000ms cubic-bezier(0.05,0.7,0.35,0.99), opacity 9000ms cubic-bezier(0.05,0.7,0.35,0.99), filter 9000ms cubic-bezier(0.05,0.7,0.35,0.99); } .ds-card-dusk:hover { border-color: rgba(251,146,60,0.22); box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px rgba(251,146,60,0.16), 0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.42), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,200,100,0.09), inset 0 -2px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.3); transform: translateY(-3px); transition: box-shadow 8000ms cubic-bezier(0.05,0.7,0.35,0.99), border-color 7000ms cubic-bezier(0.05,0.7,0.35,0.99), transform 5000ms cubic-bezier(0.05,0.7,0.35,0.99); } .ds-card-title { font-family: var(--font-libre-franklin), sans-serif; font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 600; color: #e2e8f0; margin: 0 0 0.5rem; } .ds-card-text { font-family: var(--font-bai-jamjuree), sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 400; color: #94a3b8; line-height: 1.6; margin: 0; }

components.name: Dawn Card
components.description: Dark glass card with bottom-to-top gold glow reveal on hover. Used for student-facing content.
components.html:
Card Title

Card content goes here.
components.css: .ds-card-dawn { position: relative; border-radius: 16px; transition: box-shadow 180ms ease-out, border-color 180ms ease-out, transform 180ms ease-out; overflow: hidden; padding: 1.5rem; background: linear-gradient(160deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.065) 0%, rgba(255,255,255,0.018) 100%); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.09); box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px rgba(139,26,90,0.14), 0 1px 3px -1px rgba(0,0,0,0.55), 0 4px 18px rgba(0,0,0,0.28), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.07), inset 0 -2px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.22); } .ds-card-dawn::before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: -1px; border-radius: 17px; background: linear-gradient(to top, rgba(251,191,36,0.3) 0%, rgba(251,191,36,0.1) 40%, rgba(251,191,36,0.02) 70%, transparent 100%); clip-path: inset(100% 0 0 0 round 17px); opacity: 0; filter: blur(16px); pointer-events: none; z-index: 0; transition: clip-path 200ms ease-out, opacity 200ms ease-out, filter 200ms ease-out; } .ds-card-dawn > * { position: relative; z-index: 1; } .ds-card-dawn:hover::before { clip-path: inset(0% 0 0 0 round 17px); opacity: 1; filter: blur(4px); transition: clip-path 9000ms cubic-bezier(0.05,0.7,0.35,0.99), opacity 9000ms cubic-bezier(0.05,0.7,0.35,0.99), filter 9000ms cubic-bezier(0.05,0.7,0.35,0.99); } .ds-card-dawn:hover { border-color: rgba(251,191,36,0.2); transform: translateY(-3px); transition: box-shadow 8000ms cubic-bezier(0.05,0.7,0.35,0.99), border-color 7000ms cubic-bezier(0.05,0.7,0.35,0.99), transform 5000ms cubic-bezier(0.05,0.7,0.35,0.99); } .ds-card-title { font-family: var(--font-libre-franklin), sans-serif; font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 600; color: #e2e8f0; margin: 0 0 0.5rem; } .ds-card-text { font-family: var(--font-bai-jamjuree), sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 400; color: #94a3b8; line-height: 1.6; margin: 0; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Theme-aware text input with subtle background, focus glow ring, and hover border shift.
components.css: .ds-input-group { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.375rem; } .ds-label { font-family: var(--font-bai-jamjuree), sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.02em; color: #94a3b8; } .ds-input { width: 100%; padding: 0.75rem 1rem; font-family: var(--font-bai-jamjuree), sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #e2e8f0; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.03); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); border-radius: 10px; transition: border-color 200ms ease, box-shadow 200ms ease, background 200ms ease; outline: none; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #64748b; } .ds-input:hover { border-color: rgba(251,146,60,0.3); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); } .ds-input:focus { border-color: rgba(251,146,60,0.5); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(251,146,60,0.15); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06); }

components.name: Dusk Badge
components.description: Status pill for Dusk contexts. Amber tint with optional pulsing dot.
components.css: .ds-badge-dusk { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.375rem; padding: 0.25rem 0.75rem; font-family: var(--font-bai-jamjuree), sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-transform: uppercase; border-radius: 9999px; border: 1px solid rgba(251,146,60,0.3); background: rgba(251,146,60,0.1); color: #fb923c; } .ds-badge-dot { width: 0.5rem; height: 0.5rem; border-radius: 50%; background: #fb923c; animation: ds-badge-pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite; } @keyframes ds-badge-pulse { 0%,100% { opacity: 0.5; transform: scale(1); } 50% { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1.1); } }

components.name: Dawn Badge
components.description: Status pill for Dawn contexts. Indigo tint with optional pulsing dot.
components.css: .ds-badge-dawn { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.375rem; padding: 0.25rem 0.75rem; font-family: var(--font-bai-jamjuree), sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-transform: uppercase; border-radius: 9999px; border: 1px solid rgba(99,102,241,0.3); background: rgba(99,102,241,0.1); color: #818cf8; } .ds-badge-dot { width: 0.5rem; height: 0.5rem; border-radius: 50%; background: #818cf8; animation: ds-badge-pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite; } @keyframes ds-badge-pulse { 0%,100% { opacity: 0.5; transform: scale(1); } 50% { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1.1); } }

narrative.overview: PassionSeed is a warm studio where potential is crafted into reality. The interface feels like walking into a maker space at dawn: the light is soft and golden, the tools are inviting, and everything hums with possibility. This is not a sterile classroom or a corporate dashboard. It is a place where young people come to build their future, guided by those who have already walked the path. The visual system is built around two atmospheric themes — Dawn for students (rising sun, cool blues warming into gold) and Dusk for experts (setting sun, deep purples cooling into amber). Both share the same structural DNA: fluid, luminous components that glow and respond like living things.
keyCharacteristics: Atmospheric depth through glow, blur, and gradient stacks — never flat colors
Dual-theme identity (Dawn/Dusk) with a unified structural language
Components that feel fluid and luminous, responding to interaction with slow-building warmth
Thai-first typography with Bai Jamjuree and Kodchasan
Prime-number animation durations for organic, never-syncing pulse effects
Mobile-first with touch fallbacks for all hover-driven animations

rules.name: The Gradient Minimum Rule
rules.body: Never use flat colors on hero surfaces or primary interactive elements. Minimum 3 gradient stops. A flat color is a dead color.

rules.name: The Atmosphere-First Rule
rules.body: Depth is created through layered gradients, glow effects, and blur — not through shadows or borders. Shadows are structural and rare; glow is emotional and primary.

rules.name: The Thai Space Rule
rules.body: Thai script requires more vertical breathing room. Minimum line-height 1.5 for body text, 1.6 preferred. Never go below 10px for Thai — complex glyphs become illegible.

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: The display font (Kodchasan/Libre Franklin) is used for headlines only. Body and UI text always use Bai Jamjuree/Libre Franklin. Never mix display fonts into body text for emphasis.

rules.name: The Glow-Not-Shadow Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Depth emerges through colored glow (amber for Dusk, gold/blue for Dawn) that builds slowly on interaction. A shadow says 'this is above'; a glow says 'this is alive.'

dos: Do use gradient backgrounds with 3+ stops on all hero and atmospheric surfaces
Do animate clip-path + opacity + filter together for all glow effects
Do use prime-number durations (4127ms, 4231ms, 5503ms, 5711ms) for infinite pulse layers
Do use cubic-bezier(0.05, 0.7, 0.35, 0.99) for tension animations and cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1) for snap transitions
Do provide IntersectionObserver + .in-view class fallbacks for all hover animations on touch devices
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion — disable atmospheric animations, keep essential state transitions
Do use Thai fonts (Bai Jamjuree, Kodchasan) for all Thai text
Do maintain a minimum 48x48px touch target for all interactive elements
donts: Don't use flat colors on hero surfaces or primary interactive elements. Every surface should have gradient depth.
Don't animate a single property for glow effects. A glow that reveals but stays sharp looks fake.
Don't use slow exit animations. Fast snap-out (100–200ms) on mouse-leave; slow charge-in (9s+) on hover.
Don't leave hover-only animations without touch fallbacks. Always handle @media (hover: none).
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent on cards or list items.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text). Use a single solid color with weight or size for emphasis.
Don't use glassmorphism decoratively. Blur and transparency are purposeful, never default.
Don't use the hero-metric template (big number, small label, supporting stats, gradient accent).
Don't create identical card grids with icon + heading + text repeated endlessly.
Don't use modals as a first thought. Exhaust inline and progressive alternatives first.
Don't design like corporate ed-tech: bright primary colors, stock illustrations, rigid module layouts, progress bars that feel like compliance tracking.
Don't design like generic SaaS: gray-on-white, thin lines, no personality, everything looks like Notion or Linear.
